gauge.name: Walnut Creek Upstream of I-40

impacts.statement: Minor flooding begins along Walnut Creek.

impactsLowWaters.impact: Stage needed to inundate designated Gulf Sturgeon critical habitat below Jim Woodruff Lock and Dam.
Temporary (not sustainable) operating level for of Scholz Power Plant

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
